descriptionInUI: Experimental MOOSE MANTIS IADS engine (alternative to Skynet). Only takes effect when the campaign's IADS engine is set to MANTIS; otherwise it is inert and Skynet runs instead. Phase 1 (core networking + emissions control) only — shoot-and-scoot and command-center/comms-power degradation are not yet implemented. Needs an in-game pass before it becomes the default.

specificOptions.nameInUI: Emissions control (SAM radars stay dark until a target is in range)
Generate debug information for RED IADS
Generate debug information for BLUE IADS
